title: edit or rename todo items
excerpt: HI, Searched the board for any related posts but i dont seem to find a way to edit items on my todo list widget. i can either mark them done or undone or delete items. it doesnt even let me copy the text to re write a ne…

posts.author: alex.dhia (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: HI, Searched the board for any related posts but i dont seem to find a way to edit items on my todo list widget. i can either mark them done or undone or delete items. it doesnt even let me copy the text to re write a new one when i need to edit or fix a typo
